input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(122, 248, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(15, 24, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(16, 28, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(16, 28, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(19, 28, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(19, 28, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::after.--ec-codeFontFml: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
pre::after.--ec-uiFontFml: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::before.--ec-codeFontFml: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
pre::before.--ec-uiFontFml: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgba(122, 248, 255, 0), rgba(122, 248, 255, 0.35) 18%, rgba(122, 248, 255, 0.35) 82%, rgba(122, 248, 255, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(19, 28, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid)::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgba(122, 248, 255, 0), rgba(122, 248, 255, 0.35) 18%, rgba(122, 248, 255, 0.35) 82%, rgba(122, 248, 255, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgba(19, 28, 16, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(19, 28, 16, 0.38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(19, 28, 16, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(19, 28, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(19, 28, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
